id: create-an-issue
title: "Create an issue"
description: "Requires `issue:create` permission. Runs through the `createIssueWorkflow` (DAG with compensation)."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Create an issue"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/admin/issues"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires `issue:create` permission. Runs through the `createIssueWorkflow` (DAG with compensation).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
